title: A bill to designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas, as the "Chief Zeb Smith Post Office".
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
crs_summary: This bill designates the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 107 North Hoyne Avenue in Fritch, Texas, as the Chief Zeb Smith Post Office.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
